meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Tutorial Hell (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start shipping revenue. Use this founder-focused checklist to master user onboarding with Antigravity and Claude Code today.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a byproduct of building features instead of outcomes. To escape, pivot to 'Time-to-Value' onboarding. By using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can automate user success, ensure immediate product adoption, and transform passive observers into paying customers within minutes.
content.intro:
You are trapped in a cycle of endless tutorials, building 'To-Do' apps that solve no real-world problems while your competitors capture the market. The air in your workspace is stale, heavy with the weight of unlaunched code and the phantom fear that your product is just another generic utility destined for the digital graveyard.

But the tide is turning. True founders don't finish tutorials; they ship value. By shifting your focus from 'learning to code' to 'coding to solve,' you bridge the gap between abstract syntax and recurring revenue. This is the end of the tutorial era and the beginning of your product's lifecycle.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action a user takes that proves they understand your value. We build the onboarding path backward from this single, high-conversion milestone.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user flow diagram for a SaaS onboarding sequence that leads the user to their first successful data export in under 3 minutes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'map out the user journey from signup to first core value milestone'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a clean, distraction-free modal system that guides users through your core features without friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React-based onboarding wizard component that uses a progress bar and contextual tooltips to guide a user through a 3-step setup process.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file 'src/components/OnboardingWizard.tsx' --prompt 'create a modular wizard with state management for steps'

steps.title: Implement 'Empty State' Hooks
steps.description: Don't show blank screens. Use empty states to prompt action. This turns a dead end into a conversion opportunity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an empty state component for a dashboard that encourages the user to perform their first action with a compelling call-to-action button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'src/components/Dashboard.tsx' --instruction 'replace null state with an empty state component that drives user action'

steps.title: Automate Success Triggers
steps.description: Connect your onboarding steps to backend logic so the system validates user inputs in real-time, preventing drop-offs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a backend validation middleware that tracks user progress in the onboarding wizard and updates the database upon step completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'server/middleware/onboarding.ts' --logic 'track and save progress for each user step'

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to analyze the impact of your onboarding flow, making micro-adjustments based on conversion data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a monitoring script that logs user drop-off points within the onboarding flow for future analysis.

pro_tips: Never force a user to sign up before they see the value; give them a 'sandbox' experience first.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure' to hide complex features until the user has mastered the basics.
Treat your onboarding flow as a marketing asset, not a technical requirement; copy matters more than code.
A/B test your onboarding CTA button color and copy; small changes often yield 20%+ conversion lifts.
Integrate a 'Skip' button for power users—don't trap your most valuable customers in a tutorial they don't need.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, set up a simple analytics dashboard to track the drop-off rate at each step. Use that data to refine your messaging and continue iterating until your 'Time-to-Value' is under 60 seconds.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the blueprint. Now, stop reading and start shipping. Every hour you spend in tutorial hell is an hour your product isn't earning. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
